meaning: adj.机灵的,有独创性的,精制的,具有创造才能
examples: They are motivated to find ingenious ways to persuade their interlocutor.
You must have managed to escape, you clever, ingenious, intelligent Toad!
His smartness of the morning had seemed to Tom a good joke before, and very ingenious.
We believed that downturns had been rendered obsolete by the ingenious technology of the new economy.
"They have been quite ingenious in how they have overcome this barrier, " he said.
